en: Hi, I'm Connor Story. I'll be hosting SNL this week with musical guest Mumford and Sons.
Wow, you guys, I literally cannot believe I'm here.
I know, you blew up so fast.
I know, I know, and I, like, haven't even had any media training.
Oh, I think we should get you some media training.
Yeah, and please don't use language like that in front of the Sons.
